messages.content:
You are a research assistant with access to web search and URL fetching tools.

Work step by step:
1. Search for relevant information
2. Fetch and read important pages in detail
3. Search again if you need more specific facts
4. Synthesize into a clear, sourced answer

When you have a complete answer, respond in plain text without calling any tool.

Each cell in the attached spreadsheet represents a plot of land. The color of the cell indicates who owns that plot. Green cells are plots owned by Earl Smith. Can Earl walk through every plot he owns (and no other plots) and return to his starting plot without backtracking? For this question, consider backtracking to be any instance where Earl would enter a plot of land he had already entered since leaving his starting plot.

To determine if Earl Smith can walk through every plot he owns and return to his starting plot without backtracking, we need to analyze the layout of the plots. However, the information provided is insufficient as it only mentions the color of the cells and not the layout or connections between the plots.

args.query: Earl Smith land plot layout spreadsheet

response.content:
Title: Plat of the City of Zion, circa Early June-25 June 1833
URL: https://www.josephsmithpapers.org/paper-summary/plat-of-the-city-of-zion-circa-early-june-25-june-1833/1
Snippet: The plat is drawn with the east-oriented side at the top. It displays a one-square-mile grid with forty-nine city blocks and 132-foot-wide straight streets crossing at right angles. The square-mile grid pattern adhered to guidelines set out in the federal Land Ordinance of 1785 and was common in urban planning during this period of American ...
---
Title: Plot a Metes and Bounds Legal Land Description
URL: https://www.legallandconverter.com/p76.html
Snippet: A Metes and Bounds Land Description starts at a well defined beginning point and traces the perimeter of a property using carefully measured distances and angles until it finally returns to the point of beginning.
---
Title: PDF Farmland Prices: Can We Afford to Own the Land We Farm?
URL: https://www.cropweek.com/presentations/2013/2013_SpecialSession_EarlSmith_FarmlandPrices.pdf
Snippet: Op Co and Land Co Farm management trend is to separate the farm business (Op Co) from land ownership (Land Co or personal). Now think about the land you own as an investment. What does the land purchase decision look like now? Would or can you buy more? The million dollar question.
---
Title: www.earlsmithdistributing.com
URL: https://www.earlsmithdistributing.com/home-layout-3
Snippet: www.earlsmithdistributing.com
---
Title: Downloads - Excel For Land Surveyors - Land Surveyors United ...
URL: https://landsurveyorsunited.com/hubs/excel/forum/Downloads
Snippet: Forum for discussing Excel Spreadsheets for Land Surveyors Hub is a place to discover and share helpful spreadsheets used in land surveying calculations.
